title: dysphania oblanceolata
intro: Dysphania oblanceolata, also known as Sea Purslane, is a succulent plant native to Australia and Asia, characterized by its thick, fleshy leaves and stems that can grow up to 30 centimeters in height. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Sea Purslane include its potential to reduce inflammation and oxidative stress, as well as its ability to improve cardiovascular health and protect against certain types of cancer. Dysphania oblanceolata can be prepared as a herbal remedy in various forms, including tea, capsules, and topical creams, making it a versatile plant with potential therapeutic applications.
